title: senecio cervariifolius
intro: Senecio cervariifolius, also known as Groundsel Bush or Groundsel, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Senecio cervariifolius can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to treat a range of ailments.
